parameters.name: pnl
parameters.description: Return cumulative profit/loss in TRY (the Kâr/Zarar Total line) — takes precedence over twr

parameters.name: twr
parameters.description: Return the capital-weighted cumulative-return index instead of raw value

parameters.name: targetCurrency
parameters.description: Override comparison currency (TRY/USD/EUR); when null, derived from benchmark
